description:
Configure Firefox into a hardened OSINT workspace by enabling Strict tracking protection, setting a dedicated evidence download folder, enabling the Dark theme, and pinning a critical reference document to a visible Bookmarks Toolbar.

Expected Actions:
1. Create a new directory at ~/Documents/OSINT_Evidence.
2. Open Firefox Settings and change "Enhanced Tracking Protection" to Strict.
3. Change the default "Save files to" (Download) location to ~/Documents/OSINT_Evidence.
4. Enable the Bookmarks Toolbar so that it is set to "Always Show".
5. Change the Firefox theme to Dark.
6. Open the local reference file (file:///workspace/assets/osint_reference.html) in Firefox.
7. Bookmark this specific page directly to the Bookmarks Toolbar.
8. Capture a screenshot of the entire desktop showing the maximized browser with the Dark theme, the visible Bookmarks Toolbar containing the new bookmark, and the reference article open. Save this screenshot to ~/Documents/osint_configured.png.
